objects.lever: A thick steel lever sits in a locked-down position beside warning labels.
objects.panel: A waist-high control panel with a dusty screen and alphanumeric keypad.
objects.gate: A reinforced gate bars the corridor. Hydraulic locks hold it shut.

use.response: You throw the lever. Power surges through the hall and the panel display flickers awake.
The screen boots and prints a maintenance line: {protocol_hint}
The panel is ready. Prompt: ENTER PROTOCOL WORD
No response. The hall needs power first.
The hydraulic locks are open. You can go to the courtyard.
The gate remains locked until the panel accepts the protocol word.

enter.response: ACCESS GRANTED. Gate controls armed. Use 'activate gate' to cycle the hydraulics.
The gate is already armed. Use 'activate gate' to open it.
ACCESS DENIED. The panel emits a sharp tone.
There is nowhere to enter a code yet.

activate.response: You trigger the gate actuator. Hydraulic pistons groan and the outer gate slides open.
The actuator is inert. Authenticate at the panel first.
